results.hypothesis: Rising Saudi rates BENEFIT Al Rajhi (bank profits from higher rates)
results.reason: p=0.000 | Group A avg -5.61% vs Group B 7.2% | hypothesis REVERSED (opposite true)

results.hypothesis: Stable Saudi rates are the best environment for Al Rajhi stock returns
results.reason: p=0.000 | Group A avg 7.2% vs Group B -1.23% | hypothesis CONFIRMED

results.hypothesis: RSI below 30 (oversold) produces significantly better 90d returns than baseline

results.hypothesis: RSI above 70 (overbought) produces significantly worse 90d returns than baseline
results.reason: p=0.006 | Group A avg 3.06% vs Group B 6.04% | hypothesis REVERSED (opposite true)

results.hypothesis: High global fear (VIX > 30) creates buying opportunities for Al Rajhi
results.reason: p=0.015 | Group A avg 9.99% vs Group B 6.04% | hypothesis CONFIRMED

results.hypothesis: Oil price rising improves Al Rajhi forward returns vs oil falling
results.reason: Difference too small to matter (1.17%) even if p=0.342

results.hypothesis: Strong 20-day price momentum (>10%) predicts NEGATIVE 90d returns (mean reversion)

results.hypothesis: Price near Bollinger Band lower bound predicts positive 30d returns

results.reason: p=0.000 | Group A avg -2.24% vs Group B 2.54% | hypothesis REVERSED (opposite true)

results.hypothesis: Underperforming TASI by >5% over 20 days predicts outperformance over next 90 days
